MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gina Sharron, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: David Reselbach
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant David Reselbach's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Dean Alac's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant Dean Alac is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Dean Alac in the amount of $565, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
